title: elaphoglossum angustum
intro: Elaphoglossum angustum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to South America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Elaphoglossum angustum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
